title: Working Paper Gap Register
description: Governed schema for a gap register produced by the working_paper_engine. Each entry identifies a missing or insufficient element that must be addressed before the working paper can be finalized.

gap_register_id.description: Unique identifier for this gap register artifact.

source_bundle_id.description: The working paper bundle artifact ID this register is derived from.

section_ref.description: Section ID of the working paper most affected by this gap.

impact.description: Estimated impact level on the working paper or study.

blocking.description: Whether this gap blocks forward progress on the study.

suggested_resolution.description: Suggested action or path to resolve this gap.

source_refs.description: References to source artifacts or locators supporting this gap identification.

source_artifact_id.description: Optional: ID of the source artifact where this gap was identified.

source_locator.description: Optional: locator within the source artifact (e.g., page, section, line).

engine_version.description: Version of the working_paper_engine that produced this register.

total_gaps.description: Total number of gaps in this register.

blocking_gaps.description: Number of blocking gaps in this register.
